errors.description: Policy pack schema version is missing, unsupported, or malformed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Runtime cannot determine the governance contract for the policy pack.

errors.description: Two or more policies share the same policy_id.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Duplicate IDs make audit lineage and policy decisions ambiguous.

errors.description: A policy contains overlapping allow and deny rules for the same action or selector.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Conflicting allow/deny rules make enforcement ambiguous.

errors.description: A high-risk policy does not require explicit human approval.
errors.fail_closed_reason: High-risk governance changes require human oversight.

errors.description: The policy pack or a policy is missing fail_closed=true.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Unknown or failed validation must deny execution by default.

errors.description: The policy pack or policy is outside its validity window.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Expired or not-yet-valid governance policy cannot authorize execution.

errors.description: Tenant or environment scope is missing, malformed, or not allowed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Governance scope ambiguity could permit cross-tenant or wrong-environment enforcement.
